message:
Sparsh WhatsApp sample — shorter/crisper version for approval

Namaste Sparsh Clinic 👋

Many patient enquiries get missed because they come from everywhere:
📞 missed calls
💬 WhatsApp
🌐 website
📲 Instagram

We made a short demo showing how Sparsh can track every enquiry in one simple follow-up board — so staff know who to call, when to call, and what is pending.

✅ No heavy CRM
✅ No patient medical data needed
✅ Clear owner visibility
✅ Faster appointment follow-up

Sharing the demo here. If useful, we can do a quick 10-minute walkthrough.

— Anushka
AICloudStrategist
wa.me/918796302608

Approval options: APPROVE SPARSH SHORT / CHANGES / REJECT
